data.purpose: Record ids, audit sequence numbers, hashes; tabular.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: The only ambient shadow: a warm 1px lift under cards.

shadows.name: control
shadows.purpose: Subtle tactile edge on buttons and inputs.

components.name: Primary Button (Ink)
components.description: The default action on almost every surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:40px; padding:0 16px; border:none; border-radius:6px; background:oklch(0.216 0.008 58); color:oklch(0.985 0.002 75); font:600 14px/1 'Geist Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(41,37,36,0.05); transition:background-color .15s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:oklch(0.29 0.008 58); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid oklch(0.46 0.132 24); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Accent Button (Oxblood)
components.description: Reserved for the single most consequential action on a surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:40px; padding:0 16px; border:none; border-radius:6px; background:oklch(0.46 0.132 24); color:oklch(0.985 0.006 75); font:600 14px/1 'Geist Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(41,37,36,0.05); transition:background-color .15s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background:oklch(0.4 0.13 24); } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline:2px solid oklch(0.46 0.132 24); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:40px; padding:0 16px; border:1px solid oklch(0.869 0.005 75); border-radius:6px; background:#fff; color:oklch(0.374 0.01 58); font:600 14px/1 'Geist Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(41,37,36,0.05); transition:background-color .15s,border-color .15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background:oklch(0.985 0.002 75); border-color:oklch(0.709 0.008 65); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid oklch(0.46 0.132 24); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field with oxblood focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width:260px; height:40px; padding:8px 12px; border:1px solid oklch(0.869 0.005 75); border-radius:6px; background:#fff; color:oklch(0.216 0.008 58); font:400 14px/1.4 'Geist Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(41,37,36,0.05); transition:border-color .15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:oklch(0.709 0.008 65); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color:oklch(0.46 0.132 24); outline:2px solid oklch(0.46 0.132 24 / 0.4); outline-offset:0; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Record-state pill; pairs with a leading colored dot in list rows.
components.css: .ds-badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:2px 10px; border:1px solid oklch(0.9 0.05 155); border-radius:9999px; background:oklch(0.97 0.03 155); color:oklch(0.45 0.11 155); font:500 12px/1.4 'Geist Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-dot { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:9999px; background:oklch(0.7 0.15 155); }

components.name: Record Row
components.description: Signature list row: status dot, title, tabular meta, status pill, chevron.
components.html: Senior Systems Engineer, NV13 submissions · expires 24/07/2026 · listedopen›
components.css: .ds-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; padding:16px 20px; border:1px solid oklch(0.923 0.004 75); border-radius:8px; background:#fff; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(41,37,36,0.04); text-decoration:none; transition:background-color .15s,border-color .15s; } .ds-row:hover { border-color:oklch(0.869 0.005 75); background:oklch(0.985 0.002 75 / 0.6); } .ds-row-dot { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:9999px; background:oklch(0.7 0.15 155); flex:none; } .ds-row-main { display:flex; flex-direction:column; min-width:0; flex:1; } .ds-row-title { font:600 14px/1.3 'Geist Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; color:oklch(0.216 0.008 58); } .ds-row-meta { margin-top:2px; font:400 14px/1.4 'Geist Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; color:oklch(0.553 0.01 60); font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; } .ds-row-pill { padding:2px 10px; border:1px solid oklch(0.9 0.05 155); border-radius:9999px; background:oklch(0.97 0.03 155); color:oklch(0.45 0.11 155); font:500 12px/1.4 'Geist Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-row-chev { color:oklch(0.709 0.008 65); font-size:18px; }

narrative.overview: Recruvault handles the most sensitive moment in hiring: a cleared candidate handing over clearance levels, identity documents, and right-to-work evidence. The interface feels like a well-kept compliance ledger on good paper, read at a desk in daylight. Warm, quiet, dense: paper-tinted stone neutrals, ink-black text, tabular figures, and a single deep oxblood accent rationed to brand, active nav, links, focus, and selection. Structure comes from hairline borders and tonal layering, not shadow or color. It rejects dark mode, purple/blue SaaS gradients, glassmorphism, hero-metric dashboards, and decorative motion.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper neutrals (stone ramp), ink-black text, never pure #000/#fff
One rationed accent: deep oxblood, on ~5% of any screen
Dense, legible, tabular data with hairline borders over shadows
Institutional crispness: tight 6-8px radii, restrained 150ms state motion

rules.name: The Rationed Voice Rule
rules.body: Oxblood appears on no more than ~5% of any screen. Never a primary-button fill, never a background panel, never decoration.

rules.name: The Warm-Only Rule
rules.body: Every neutral tilts warm. zinc, slate, gray, #000 and #fff are forbidden; use the stone ramp and paper/ink tokens.

rules.name: The Tabular Figures Rule
rules.body: Any surface showing numbers as data uses font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. State is border and background, never a growing drop shadow.

dos: Do keep every neutral warm: use the stone ramp, paper, and ink tokens.
Do ration oxblood to brand, active nav, links, focus, selection, and status dots (<=5% of a screen).
Do use tabular figures for all numeric data so ledgers align.
Do express hover/focus with border and background shifts and a 2px oxblood focus outline.
Do give empty states an accent icon, a teaching sentence, and a primary action.
donts: Don't ship dark mode or honour prefers-color-scheme; the product is light-only.
Don't use zinc, slate, gray, #000, or #fff; they read cold against the paper.
Don't fill primary buttons with oxblood; primary is ink, oxblood is the rationed accent.
Don't reach for purple/blue trust gradients, glassmorphism, hero-metric tiles, or identical icon-card grids.
Don't grow drop shadows on hover or animate layout properties; motion is <=150ms.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy.
